news.headline: US CPI lower than expected at 3.1% vs 3.2%, sparking talk of rate cuts. Chance of a May cut now 31.4%, up 3x from last month. BTC price fell from $84,000 to $83,000 due to trade war uncertainty. Fed may cut rates by 2025 to refinance $9.2 trillion debt.
news.summary: The US core Consumer Price Index (CPI) for inflation was lower than expected at 3.1%, beating the expected 3.2%, accompanied by a 0.1% drop in headline inflation. Analysts predict this may lead to a potential interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve, with markets now pricing a 31.4% chance of a May cut, a significant increase from last month. There is a belief that the Federal Reserve will cut interest rates by June 2025. Despite the positive inflation numbers, Bitcoin's price decreased due to ongoing macroeconomic uncertainty and trade war concerns. President Trump's focus on interest rate cuts could be linked to refinancing approximately $9.2 trillion in debt by 2025, as a failure to refinance could increase the national debt and interest payments. The Federal Reserve has shown caution in rushing to cut rates, with analysts suggesting that the lack of rate cuts could trigger a bear market. Market participants speculate that President Trump may be intentionally crashing markets to push for rate cuts, a notion opposed by Federal Reserve officials who are calling for a pause in rate cuts until inflation decreases.

Rio Tinto and Edify Energy sign solar agreement supplying 90% power to Rio Tinto's Gladstone operations for 20 years.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto and Edify Energy have finalized two solar and battery hybrid services agreements to enhance the provision of dependable and cost-effective electricity to Rio Tinto’s Gladstone aluminium operations in Queensland. As per the deals, Rio Tinto is set to acquire 90% of the power and battery storage production from the Smoky Creek & Guthrie’s Gap Solar Power Stations for a duration of 20 years. Edify Energy will be responsible for the construction, ownership, and operation of these projects.

Wintrust wins 14 Best Bank awards in Middle Market Banking by Crisil Coalition Greenwich, 10 national, 4 regional.
news.summary: In Rosemont, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, Wintrust Financial Corporation (Nasdaq: WTFC) received a notable recognition from Crisil Coalition Greenwich. This accolade signifies Wintrust's remarkable consistency, as it marks the 10th consecutive year of acknowledgment by the organization. news.headline: Tesla stock jumps as analysts cut price targets, warning of brand damage. Delivery and earnings estimates slashed.
news.summary: Despite analysts cutting price targets and slashing delivery and earnings estimates for Tesla, the company saw a rebound on Wednesday. Analysts have expressed concerns about potential brand "destruction," leading to price target cuts. However, Tesla stock jumped, showing resilience in the face of these warnings. The company's ability to bounce back may indicate confidence among investors, despite the negative sentiment from analysts. This positive movement comes as analysts adjust their estimates, with the future trajectory of Tesla's brand and performance still uncertain.

NRG acquiring 738 MW of natural gas generation in Texas for $560 million, increasing portfolio strength.
news.summary: Houston-based NRG Energy Inc. (NYSE:NRG) has finalized a deal to purchase six power generation plants from Rockland Capital, LLC in Texas. This acquisition boosts NRG's capacity by 738 Megawatts (MW) through the addition of modern, flexible natural gas-fired facilities. The purchase comprises one combined-cycle unit and five peaker units, enhancing NRG's presence in the expanding market. The transaction is valued at $560 million, equating to $760 per kilowatt (kW), offering a significant cost advantage compared to newer options.

news.headline: Psoriatic Arthritis market transformed by biosimilar growth with Celltrion's STEQEYMA & Biocon's YESINTEK. Costs challenged.
news.summary: The psoriatic arthritis market is witnessing a transformation with the introduction of biosimilars such as STEQEYMA by Celltrion and YESINTEK by Biocon. These cost-effective alternatives are posing a challenge to established biologics. Competition is increasing as these biosimilars reshape treatment options. This shift is impacting the market dynamics significantly.

New Zealand year on year net immigration slowed to 32,471 in January
ViiV Healthcare's EMBRACE study shows strong HIV suppression with 96% efficacy; presented at CROI 2025. 88% with SC VH109.
news.summary: ViiV Healthcare released new data from its EMBRACE phase 2b trial, revealing that administering N6LS (VH3810109 or VH109) every four months alongside monthly cabotegravir long-acting (CAB LA) effectively suppressed viral levels in adults with HIV already on stable treatment. These findings were showcased at the Conference on Retroviruses and Opportunistic Infections (CROI 2025). At the six-month primary endpoint:- 96% of participants on VH109 60mg/kg intravenously (IV) and 88% on VH109 3000mg subcutaneously (SC) with rHuPH20 maintained HIV-1 RNA levels below 50 copies/mL, in comparison to 96% in the standard-of-care group.- Notably, 4% of the IV group and 6% of the SC group recorded HIV-1 RNA levels at or above 50 copies/mL during measurements.

news.headline: Check out how to be prosperous like Mahmoud Khalil gaining 1 million followers in just one week.
Rumble purchases $17M in Bitcoin as part of investment strategy inspired by Trump's policies to strengthen ties with crypto industry.
news.summary: Rumble, a video-sharing platform, recently announced its purchase of 188 Bitcoin for $17.1 million as part of an investment strategy proposed by CEO Chris Pavlovski in November following Donald Trump's victory in the US presidential election. This move was intended as a hedge against inflation and to strengthen ties to the crypto industry. Rumble hinted at the possibility of further Bitcoin purchases based on market conditions. The platform hosts Trump's social media platform, Truth Social, and has also signed a service agreement with the government of El Salvador. This investment aligns Rumble with other companies that have entered the crypto market post-election, such as Genius Group and Semler Scientific. The Trump administration has been actively engaging with the crypto industry, with plans for a national Bitcoin reserve that could impact the market if Congress enacts legislation to hodl seized BTC. Trump's hosting of a summit with crypto executives further underscores this push towards crypto involvement at the federal level.

SentinelOne reported Q4 revenue of $225.5M, beating estimates. EPS at 4 cents per share, shares fell due to soft guidance. ARR at $920.1M, 27% YoY growth.
news.summary: SentinelOne Inc (NYSE:S) released its Q4 financial results with revenue hitting $225.5 million, surpassing the expected $222.25 million, as per Benzinga Pro. The cybersecurity company also exceeded projections for adjusted earnings at four cents per share, above the anticipated one cent per share. Furthermore, total revenue saw a 29% annual increase, while Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) spiked by 27% year-over-year, reaching $920.1 million.

news.summary: The company is expected to see a sustained increase in revenue, with a positive forecast for top-line growth in the year 2025. This signifies a promising outlook for the company's financial performance, indicating further expansion and stronger results.

news.headline: U.S. banks as validators risk centralization in PoS networks, affecting staking yields. OCC relaxes crypto-banking rules. Ether APR: 5.5%, Solana: 8%.
news.summary: The US Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) recently allowed banks to be validators for blockchain networks, including Ethereum and Solana. Bohdan Opryshko, COO of Everstake, sees this as a positive step for institutional adoption but warns of increasing centralization risks. Banks entering proof-of-stake networks could concentrate power and reduce decentralization. The move might also lower staking rewards, affecting smaller validators. As of Mar 12, Ether stakers earn 5.5% APR and Solana stakers close to 8%. The move follows Trump’s push to improve crypto firms' access to banking services. Anchorage Digital is the sole US federally chartered bank offering cryptocurrency staking.

news.headline: American Eagle Outfitters Q4 report: Earnings 54 cents, revenue $1.6 billion, comparable sales up 3%. Stock slides after report.
news.summary: American Eagle Outfitters (NYSE:AEO) unveiled its fourth-quarter results post Wednesday's market close, highlighting key figures from the quarter. The company reported GAAP earnings of 54 cents, in line with analyst predictions, and quarterly revenue of $1.6 billion, meeting estimates. American Eagle reported a 3% rise in total comparable sales for the fourth quarter. - The Trump Media & Technology Stock has experienced a 50% drop since Inauguration Day. For further details, refer to Benzinga.com for the complete story.

news.headline: Positron Networks offers 90 days of free access to Project Robbie, an AI platform, to assist researchers and educators.
news.summary: In Seattle, Positron Networks is enhancing access to their AI-driven research tools by granting a 90-day free trial to Project Robbie, their cutting-edge AI and machine learning platform. This move aims to aid researchers, educators, and organizations by eliminating financial constraints and offering robust computational capabilities amidst growing uncertainty in research funding. Access to dependable and scalable computing is crucial for the progress of research and education, making this initiative a significant opportunity for the target audience.

news.headline: ShaMaran Petroleum Corp. reported record production in 2024, with over 21,000 bopd and nearly 72 million barrels in reserves. Cash flow increased to $98 million, and $34.7 million revenue in Q4 2024 (71% YoY). Gross debt was $215.5 million at the end of 2024. EBITDAX was $21.9 million in Q4 2024 (71% rise YoY).
news.summary: ShaMaran Petroleum Corp. reported its financial results for 2024, with a record production of over 21,000 barrels of oil per day and reserves of nearly 72 million barrels of oil. They saw a cash flow of almost $98 million, with a decrease in bond debt by $78 million. They acquired a 50% working interest in Atrush Block and extended their bond maturity to July 2027. The closure of the Iraq-Türkiye pipeline impacted operations. They had $34.7 million in revenue in Q4 2024 and $109.4 million for FY 2024. Cash flow from operations was $34.7 million in Q4 and $98 million for the year. EBITDAX was $21.9 million in Q4 and $72.3 million for the year. They had cash of $76.8 million and gross debt of $215.5 million at the end of 2024.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 12, 2025, at the HumanX Summit, Coco Robotics revealed a new partnership with OpenAI to enhance AI and robotics technology. In this collaboration, the two companies will exchange knowledge gathered from over 500,000 monitored data points.

news.headline: Parkland Corp. to pay $0.36/share dividend on April 15, 2025 to shareholders of record on March 21.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 12, 2025, Parkland Corporation ("Parkland") disclosed plans to issue a dividend of $0.36 per share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on April 15, 2025, for shareholders recorded as of March 21, 2025. It is worth noting that this dividend will be considered an 'eligible dividend' in the context of Canadian income tax regulations.

news.headline: ROZLYTREK sees growth in the market catering to NTRK and ROS1-positive cancers. Rising demand for tumor-agnostic therapies is creating a valuable market segment for the drug, despite competition from similar TRK inhibitors like VITRAKVI.
news.summary: With the increasing importance of biomarker testing and the growing need for tumor-agnostic treatments, the drug ROZLYTREK is positioned to capture a niche market. Despite facing competition from other TRK inhibitors like larotrectinib (VITRAKVI), its unique ability to target the central nervous system (CNS) makes it a promising contender. This trend is reflected in the rising demand, with the market value for such therapies estimated to be in the millions. As such, the potential for ROZLYTREK to cater to this specialized yet lucrative market segment appears significant.

Travere Therapeutics granted 77,200 shares of common stock to five new employees on March 10, 2025 as inducement equity grants.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, Travere Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: TVTX) revealed that its Compensation Committee granted inducement equity rewards totaling 77,200 shares of common stock to five new employees. This includes 36,000 shares in stock options and 41,200 shares in restricted stock units (RSUs). These grants were issued outside of the 2018 Equity Incentive Plan and are deemed essential inducements for the new employees joining Travere. The inducement stock options and RSUs align with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
